chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application No.D-13 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.Forhearing of main case 23-05-2024 M/s Ali Dad Narejo & Athar Hussain Abro, Advocates for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for applicant submit that they would be satisfied if applicant is permitted to file a fresh application before the trial Court viz. Anti-Terrorism Court, Khairpur under section 23 of ATA, 1997 for transfer of the case to ordinary Court, as FIR registered by the applicant/accused against the complainant party has already been transferred to the Court of ordinary jurisdiction. Learned APG has recorded no objection. Accordingly, this Crl. Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed. However, applicant is at liberty to file same application before the trial Court which shall be decided, independent of impugned order dated 10.10.2023. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
